title: gladiolus delpierrei
intro: Gladiolus delpierrei, also known as the African corn lily, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Gladiolus delpierrei include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Gladiolus delpierrei can be made by infusing the plant's roots or rhizomes in hot water to create a decoction, which can be used to treat various health issues.
